title: framework
description: Dynamically constructed assessment framework for this submission. Defines active domains, modules, criticality classifications, and scoring weights for both tracks. Produced by framework-builder, confirmed at Confirmation Point 2.

domains.description: All 10 domains — active domains are scored, inactive domains are excluded with documented rationale.

domain_id.description: Domain number (1–10) per PRD Appendix A taxonomy.

active.description: Whether this domain is active for this submission.

activation_rationale.description: Why this domain is active or inactive.

domain_weight.description: Relative weight of this domain in overall scoring (sum across active domains = 1.0).

criticality_classification.description: Domain criticality classification. hard-blocker: absence = NO-GO gate triggered; critical: heavily weighted; standard: default weight; contextual: lower weight given submission context.

professional_standard_basis.description: If this module is a hard requirement per professional standards, identifies the standard (e.g., 'VC best practice: team credibility is always assessed').

assessor_override.description: Whether the assessor modified the default criticality at Confirmation Point 2.

readiness_weight.description: Weight of this module in the Readiness Track domain score.

fit_weight.description: Weight of this module in the Fit-to-Purpose Track domain score.

readiness_track_weight.description: Weight of Readiness Track in overall score. Default 0.6.

fit_to_purpose_track_weight.description: Weight of Fit-to-Purpose Track in overall score. Default 0.4.

go_nogo_thresholds.description: Score thresholds for go/no-go determination outcomes.

total_modules.description: Total number of active modules in the framework.

framework_construction_log.description: Documents how the framework was constructed.

confirmation_status.description: Whether this framework has been confirmed at Confirmation Point 2.
